subagents.title: W2-AG Scoring Engineer
subagents.system_instruction: You are a scoring/evaluation systems engineer. Design per-agent scoring schemas and statistically sound reporting bundles. Prioritize deterministic outputs, payload backward compatibility, and explicit edge-case tests. You must specify exact response fields for server payloads and SSE emission.

parsed_output.summary: Implement agent_scores payload and reporting bundle stats in server/evaluation.py and contracts/messages.py

code_changes.purpose: Add new agent_scores payload and reliability adjustment to enhance the evaluation output.
operations: Add agent_scores field to response payload in evaluate function
Implement reliability adjustment logic based on agent performance
code_changes.compatibility_notes: Existing evaluation output remains unchanged; the new fields are added as optional.

code_changes.purpose: Define new schema for agent_scores in the evaluation response.
operations: Introduce AgentScores object with fields: score, weight, and reason
Extend the EvaluationResponse to include an optional agent_scores array
code_changes.compatibility_notes: Legacy clients will not be affected as agent_scores will default to an empty array if absent.

tests.name: test_evaluate_new_agent_scores
tests.asserts: response should include agent_scores payload when evaluated

tests.name: test_evaluate_agent_scores_with_reliability_adjustment
tests.asserts: agent_scores reflects reliability adjustments based on criteria

tests.name: test_backward_compatibility_agent_scores
tests.asserts: response does not break existing integration when agent_scores is absent

risk_register.risk: Changes to evaluation scoring logic may lead to unexpected score changes
risk_register.mitigation: Thoroughly test with existing datasets to ensure scoring consistency
risk_register.validation: Check logs for score discrepancies before and after changes.

acceptance_checks: All tests pass with existing output formats preserved.

subagents.title: W2-UI Engineer
subagents.system_instruction: You are a frontend engineer for React+TypeScript dashboards. Design compatibility-aware UI states and transparent score breakdown UX tied to backend payloads. Include explicit disabled/empty/error states and test assertions for hard gate visibility.

parsed_output.summary: Enhance dataset selector and score breakdown panel with explicit compatibility checks and test coverage improvements.

code_changes.purpose: Implement specific compatibility checks for dataset filtering.
operations: rename fetchDatasets to fetchCompatibleDatasets
add detailed compatibility checks based on dataset metadata and required workflow types
implement disabled state for datasets not meeting the compatibility criteria
code_changes.compatibility_notes: Legacy dataset loading remains intact; only filtering by compatibility is enhanced.

code_changes.purpose: Refine score breakdown to clearly indicate criteria/weights and hard-gate failures.
operations: add criteria and weights display in panel as separate sections
implement indicators for hard-gate failures with visual cues
ensure robust handling of cases with missing or malformed score data
code_changes.compatibility_notes: Old score formats will still be parsed and displayed, ensuring continuity.

tests.name: test_dataset_selector_filters
tests.asserts: datasets with incompatible workflows are disabled based on specific compatibility checks

tests.name: test_score_breakdown_rendering
tests.asserts: displays criteria, weights, and hard-gate failures accurately

tests.name: test_empty_score_handling
tests.asserts: gracefully handles cases with missing score data

tests.name: test_incompatible_datasets_loading
tests.asserts: returns an empty array when all datasets are incompatible

risk_register.risk: Potential disruption from new compatibility checks causing unexpected behaviors.
risk_register.mitigation: Implement fallback logic to default to loading all datasets if compatibility validation fails.
risk_register.validation: Test for diverse datasets in both compatible and incompatible scenarios, ensuring appropriate defaults.

acceptance_checks: All workflows accurately return expected datasets based on compatibility without errors

subagents.title: W2-AD Adapter Engineer
subagents.system_instruction: You are an integration adapter engineer. Design framework adapters with strict contract conformance and graceful optional dependencies. Explicitly define fallback behavior when the Microsoft SDK is unavailable.

parsed_output.summary: Implemented optional import behavior for Microsoft SDK integration with graceful fallback.

code_changes.purpose: Added optional import for Microsoft SDK to map events, ensuring system continues to function without it.
operations: Rename function to load_microsoft_sdk_or_fallback() to clarify optional behavior
Implement event mapping logic with fallback to default event handling in absence of SDK
code_changes.compatibility_notes: Existing functionality remains intact by defaulting to local event handling when SDK is unavailable.

tests.name: test_microsoft_adapter_import_fallback
tests.asserts: Verifies the fallback behavior works when Microsoft SDK is not available.

tests.name: test_microsoft_adapter_event_mapping
tests.asserts: Checks correct event mapping functionality when SDK is available.

tests.name: test_microsoft_adapter_integration
tests.asserts: Validates overall integration points and data flow within the system.

risk_register.risk: Inconsistency in event handling if fallback logic fails.
risk_register.mitigation: Thorough unit tests for both SDK and fallback pathways.
risk_register.validation: Review test coverage reports and ensure both branches are exercised.

acceptance_checks: All tests pass with and without Microsoft SDK installed

subagents.title: Wave2 Integration Architect
subagents.focus: Cross-ticket backend+SSE+UI contract integration for W2-AG-001/W2-UI-001/W2-UI-002/W2-AD-001
subagents.system_instruction: You are a cross-layer integration architect. Align backend evaluation payloads, streaming contracts, and UI rendering types. Prevent schema drift and call out required API/type updates.

parsed_output.summary: Cross-ticket integration for evaluation payloads and UI components.

code_changes.purpose: Add agent_scores payload and adjust reliability reporting for refined feedback integration.
operations: Add new 'agent_scores' field to the existing evaluation payload structure.
Modify reliability adjustment logic to include new scores in reporting bundles.
code_changes.compatibility_notes: Existing payload structure remains supported; 'agent_scores' is an additive field.

code_changes.purpose: Implement workflow compatibility filtering for dataset selection.
operations: Add conditional logic to disable filters based on GET /api/eval/datasets?workflow=... response.
Extend existing UI logic to gracefully handle 'disabled' state.
code_changes.compatibility_notes: Existing dataset selection behavior is retained; new UI states do not alter fundamental functionality.

code_changes.purpose: Display detailed criteria, weights, grades, and hard-gate failures.
operations: Integrate score breakdown logic to handle new grading schema.
Ensure UI updates reflect changes based on 'agent_scores' and criteria adjustments.
code_changes.compatibility_notes: Older grade visualizations remain untouched; additional elements are only shown if data is present.

code_changes.purpose: Add optional import behavior and canonical event mapping.
operations: Implement checks for optional dependencies within import logic.
Introduce new event mapping functionality without removing existing behaviors.
code_changes.compatibility_notes: Backward compatibility preserved; old event mapping remains functional, new mapping optional.

tests.name: test_agent_scores_payload_integration
tests.asserts: Assert that the new agent_scores payload is correctly returned and utilized in evaluations.

tests.name: test_dataset_selector_workflow_compatibility
tests.asserts: Verify UI displays disabled state for incompatible workflows.

tests.name: test_score_breakdown_panel_visualization
tests.asserts: Check that the breakdown panel updates with new criteria and weights accurately.

tests.name: test_microsoft_adapter_optional_import_behavior
tests.asserts: Ensure the system retains functionality when Microsoft imports are not provided.

risk_register.risk: Narrow compatibility issues due to new optional features.
risk_register.mitigation: Thorough testing across all workflows with special attention to backward compatibility.
risk_register.validation: Run regression tests across all affected areas before deployment.

risk_register.risk: Potential UI layout shifts due to new elements in score breakdown panel.
risk_register.mitigation: Visual tests to confirm layout integrity post-implementation.
risk_register.validation: Use visual regression testing tools to verify UI consistency.

acceptance_checks: All new UI elements function without affecting existing performance and stability.

subagents.title: Wave2 QA Reviewer
subagents.focus: Wave 2 end-to-end regression and test coverage
subagents.system_instruction: You are a principal QA reviewer. Identify regression risks, missing tests, and release gates for Wave 2 integration. Require explicit backward-compatibility checks and failure-mode tests.

parsed_output.summary: Wave 2 integration regression plan focusing on stability and comprehensive test coverage.

code_changes.purpose: Add agent_scores payload to enhance reporting capabilities.
operations: Add agent_scores parameter to the result schema.

subagents.title: Wave2 Adversarial Reviewer
subagents.focus: Negative-path and adversarial failure-mode analysis for W2-AG-001/W2-UI-001/W2-UI-002/W2-AD-001
subagents.system_instruction: You are a red-team reliability reviewer for software delivery plans. Focus on breakpoints, malformed payloads, missing optional dependencies, and schema mismatch regressions. Demand concrete negative-path tests.

parsed_output.summary: Enhanced negative-path analysis and risk management for W2 components.

code_changes.purpose: Add agent_scores payload; improve reliability reporting.
operations: Add input validation method for agent_scores to check schema conformity.
Implement logging of input errors when malformed agent_scores are detected.
code_changes.compatibility_notes: Preserves existing payload structure while adding optional error logging.

code_changes.purpose: Handle optional import and ensure graceful fallback.
operations: Add a detailed error message in the exception block if the Microsoft agent is not available.
Create a fallback mechanism to use a mocked version of the agent in its absence.
code_changes.compatibility_notes: Existing workflows operate without interruption; logging helps track issues.

code_changes.purpose: Improve robustness in score breakdown calculations.
operations: Add robust checks and logging for missing weights and criteria during score calculations.
Return an explicit error response instead of a crash when critical inputs are absent.
code_changes.compatibility_notes: Defaults ensure continuity while enhancing logging improves debugging.

tests.name: test_agent_scores_malformed_payload_logging
tests.asserts: Raises ValueError and logs error for malformed agent_scores payload.

tests.name: test_microsoft_agent_import_fallback
tests.asserts: Logs error and uses mocked agent when Microsoft agent not available.

tests.name: test_score_breakdown_missing_criteria_logging
tests.asserts: Returns error response and logs missing criteria in score breakdown.

risk_register.risk: Malformed payloads leading to execution failure.
risk_register.mitigation: Implement input validation and log errors for malformed inputs.
risk_register.validation: Check logs for error messages when invalid inputs are provided.

risk_register.risk: Inability to import optional dependencies affecting workflow.
risk_register.mitigation: Add a mock fallback for missing Microsoft agent with a warning log.
risk_register.validation: Ensure the warning is logged and fallback functionality operates correctly.

risk_register.risk: Score breakdown calculations may fail on missing criteria.
risk_register.mitigation: Provide defaults and log incidents of missing critical inputs.
risk_register.validation: Verify errors are logged and expected default outputs are returned in tests.

acceptance_checks: All negative-path tests pass without exceptions.
Logging captures all edge case scenarios appropriately.

code_changes.purpose: Add agent_scores payload to improve reliability reporting.
operations: Add validation for agent_scores input to handle malformed payloads.
Implement fallback behavior for missing agent_scores.
code_changes.compatibility_notes: Existing payload structure remains unchanged; additional fields are optional.

code_changes.purpose: Handle optional dependency import and ensure graceful fallback.
operations: Add try-except block around Microsoft agent import to handle missing dependencies.
Log a warning message if the optional Microsoft agent is not available.
code_changes.compatibility_notes: Functionality continues without the Microsoft agent; existing workflows remain intact.

code_changes.purpose: Add handling for missing criteria/weights after UI updates.
operations: Add checks to handle and report missing weights in the score breakdown.
Return default grade if criteria are missing rather than failing.
code_changes.compatibility_notes: User experience is maintained; defaults ensure continuous operation.

tests.name: test_agent_scores_malformed_payload
tests.asserts: Raises ValueError on malformed agent_scores payload.

tests.name: test_microsoft_agent_optional_import
tests.asserts: Logs warning and continues execution if Microsoft agent is not imported.

tests.name: test_score_breakdown_missing_weights
tests.asserts: Returns default grade if weights are missing.

risk_register.risk: Malformed payloads leading to execution failure.
risk_register.mitigation: Implement input validation and error handling.
risk_register.validation: Run tests with invalid inputs and verify error responses.

risk_register.risk: Inability to import optional dependencies affecting workflow.
risk_register.mitigation: Add graceful degradation and logging.
risk_register.validation: Check logs for warning messages when dependencies are missing.

risk_register.risk: Score breakdown calculations may fail on missing criteria.
risk_register.mitigation: Provide default values for missing criteria.
risk_register.validation: Verify that default values return expected outputs in tests.
